One solid option is the XPress 750 High-Step Long-Range Commuter e-bike with $444 in FREE bundled gear at $1,299 shipped (plus the extra mystery gift). This bundle would normally run you $1,743 in total, including the $44 value of the mystery gift. This gives you a step-up from the previous $400 bundle that it’ll revert to after this flash sale ends, making it a much more opportune time to grab yours today. Head below to learn all about this e-bike that began my journey with Lectric, as well as browse the full lineup of offers that are only lasting until midnight, broken down into standard-range and long-range sections.

items.summary:
Baseus 120W 6-in-1 USB-C Desktop Charging Station

Buy for $25.50 (Reg. $50)

Apply code ESYFJBJI during checkout.

What we love

Outfitted with a total of six ports, this makes for a solid addition to a nightstand, desk, or even your travel kit. The six outputs are split with two USB-A and four Type-C. This is the right approach if you ask me, leaning mostly into USB-C with some room to fall back to USB-A when needed.
